mapper.select: select kpi_id, streamer_id, kpi_year, kpi_month, gift_daily, gift_monthly, new_fan_daily, new_fan_monthly, chat_daily, chat_monthly, new_tip_daily, new_tip_monthly, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from live_kpi_config where kpi_year = #{year} and kpi_month = #{month} and ((#{streamerId} is null and streamer_id is null) or streamer_id = #{streamerId}) limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into live_kpi_config (streamer_id, kpi_year, kpi_month, gift_daily, gift_monthly, new_fan_daily, new_fan_monthly, chat_daily, chat_monthly, new_tip_daily, new_tip_monthly, create_by, create_time) values (#{streamerId}, #{kpiYear}, #{kpiMonth}, #{giftDaily}, #{giftMonthly}, #{newFanDaily}, #{newFanMonthly}, #{chatDaily}, #{chatMonthly}, #{newTipDaily}, #{newTipMonthly}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from live_kpi_config where kpi_id in
#{kpiId}
